summary: SmartMast sensors and AI turn commercial vessels into a maritime awareness network.
editor_note: The useful bet is turning ordinary ships into a sensing network instead of selling another fleet dashboard. Quartermaster puts SmartMast cameras, radios, geolocation, and AI on 600+ vessels, then shows verified HD video, alerts, and real-time tracking. Compared with AIS pings, the product captures what ships actually see. The risk is whether network coverage scales faster than hardware installation drag.

funding.lead_investor: First Round Capital and Quiet Capital
